definitions.title: News
definitions.description: Stay informed with news, announcements and important community developments.
definitions.purpose: Stay informed with the latest news and stories from the Australian Hazara community.

definitions.title: Education
definitions.description: Celebrating academic achievement, learning and educational opportunity.
definitions.purpose: Recognising people and organisations for achievements and contributions in education.

definitions.title: Sport
definitions.description: Celebrating sporting achievement and community participation through sport.
definitions.purpose: Recognising athletes, teams and organisations for achievements and contributions in sport.

definitions.title: Business
definitions.description: Celebrating entrepreneurs, business growth and economic achievement.
definitions.purpose: Recognising people and organisations for achievements, innovation and contributions in business.

definitions.title: Arts and Culture
definitions.description: Celebrating creativity, heritage and cultural expression.
definitions.purpose: Recognising artists, creators and organisations for achievements and contributions in arts and culture.

definitions.title: Community Event
definitions.description: Upcoming gatherings, workshops and celebrations for the community.
definitions.purpose: Discover community events, gatherings, workshops and celebrations.

definitions.title: Community Leadership
definitions.purpose: Recognising people and organisations for leadership, volunteering and community service.
